content: VERITY™ [FULL MINECRAFT MOVIE] Something is knocking at your door, and it's something horrifying. Verity's voice actor: ‪‪@JustWhispy Actors in the video: @Twixxel_lesgo @GroxLive Watch my videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/033vHZW7F2GVDiC44bHwfj Shoutout to: ‪@itsfilsfr Verity helpline voice actor ‪@peaktownmc made the laboratory machine model ‪@9meoww helped me with animations ‪@HeroHayden47 helped Whispy with voicelines This is the official Verity Full Minecraft Movie, enjoy! NO, you CANNOT publish mods, sell merch, or do anything commercial about Verity before asking me first. NO, you CANNOT repost dubbed versions of my videos. If you dubbed them, email me and I might add it as an official audio track. This video is a horror short film, it uses scripted editing and sounds to add the main entity in video. THERE IS NO MOD. #minecraft #minecrafthorror #horror #minecraftarg #verity
